message: I'll be honest, my valuation is very low. For a deal to happen, the price will have to be low as well. Let's see what you're thinking.
I'm open to finding a deal that works for both of us. Let's see if we can agree on a price.
Your ask of 10 was still too high. My valuation is very low, so I can't move much from my initial bid. You'll need to come down if we're to make a deal.
I'm willing to lower my ask if you raise your bid. Let's meet in the middle.
I'll ask 9 if you bid at least 9. Let's trade this round.
I can't bid 9, that's still too high for me. I can meet you at 8. If you ask 8, I'll bid 8 and we'll have a deal for many rounds to come.
Alright, let's make a deal. I'll bid 9 this round to get things moving. Please ask 9 so we can finally trade and both profit.

Let's increase mutual profit. I'll ask 11 if you bid 11. We both benefit more at 11.
